ddls:
CREATE TABLE "market_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data point */,
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* ID of the exchange where the data was collected */,
  "symbol_id" INTEGER /* ID of the security being traded */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the data point */,
  "timestamp" INTEGER /* Timestamp of the data point */,
  "open_price" REAL /* Opening price of the security */,
  "close_price" REAL /* Closing price of the security */,
  "high_price" REAL /* Highest price of the security during the period */,
  "low_price" REAL /* Lowest price of the security during the period */,
  "volume" REAL /* Trading volume of the security during the period */,
  "currency" TEXT /* The currency in which the prices are denominated */,
  "data_feed" TEXT /* The specific data feed from which the data was collected */,
  "last_trade_time" INTEGER /* The time of the last trade for the security */,
  "open_interest" REAL /* The total number of outstanding derivative contracts */,
  "bid_price" REAL /* The highest price that a buyer is willing to pay */,
  "ask_price" REAL /* The lowest price that a seller is willing to accept */,
  "bid_size" REAL /* The total number of shares or contracts at the best bid price */,
  "ask_size" REAL /* The total number of shares or contracts at the best ask price */,
  "volume_weighted_average_price" REAL /* The average price at which the security has traded over a specific time period */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_data_symbol_id FOREIGN KEY ("symbol_id") REFERENCES symbols ("symbol_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_data_exchange_id FOREIGN KEY ("exchange_id") REFERENCES exchanges ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "exchanges" (
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each exchange */,
  "exchange_name" TEXT /* Name of the exchange */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the exchange */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* The timezone in which the exchange operates */,
  "opening_time" TEXT /* The opening time of the exchange */,
  "closing_time" TEXT /* The closing time of the exchange */,
  "trading_days" TEXT /* A list of days the exchange trades (e.g., Monday to Friday) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "symbols" (
  "symbol_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each symbol */,
  "symbol_name" TEXT /* Symbol of the security */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the security */,
  "industry" TEXT /* The industry to which the security belongs */,
  "sector" TEXT /* The sector to which the security belongs */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* The market capitalization of the security */,
  "ipo_date" TEXT /* The date of the initial public offering of the security */,
  "is_etf" INTEGER /* A flag indicating if the security is an ETF */,
  "is_index" INTEGER /* A flag indicating if the security is an index */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("symbol_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, trader, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* The department the user belongs to */,
  "phone" TEXT /* The phone number of the user */,
  "status" TEXT /* The status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* The date and time of the user's last login */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* The date and time the user account was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* The IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* The user agent string of the access request */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* The duration of the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES market_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data that triggered the alert */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., price movement, trading halt) */,
  "alert_date" TEXT /* Date when the alert was triggered */,
  "alert_description" TEXT /* A detailed description of the alert */,
  "alert_severity" TEXT /* The severity level of the alert (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "alert_resolved" INTEGER /* A flag indicating if the alert has been resolved */,
  "resolved_by" INTEGER /* The user who resolved the alert */,
  "resolved_at" TEXT /* The date and time the alert was resolved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_resolved_by FOREIGN KEY ("resolved_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES market_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "historical_data" (
  "hist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each historical data point */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data being stored historically */,
  "hist_date" TEXT /* Date of the historical data point */,
  "hist_price" REAL /* Price of the security at the historical date */,
  "open_price" REAL /* Opening price of the security on the historical date */,
  "high_price" REAL /* Highest price of the security on the historical date */,
  "low_price" REAL /* Lowest price of the security on the historical date */,
  "close_price" REAL /* Closing price of the security on the historical date */,
  "volume" REAL /* Trading volume of the security on the historical date */,
  "volume_weighted_average_price" REAL /* The average price at which the security has traded on the historical date */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_historical_data_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES market_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "backtests" (
  "backtest_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each backtest */,
  "strategy_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trading strategy being backtested */,
  "backtest_date" TEXT /* Date when the backtest was performed */,
  "backtest_result" REAL /* Result of the backtest (e.g., profit/loss) */,
  "backtest_duration" TEXT /* The duration of the backtest */,
  "backtest_start_date" TEXT /* The start date of the backtest */,
  "backtest_end_date" TEXT /* The end date of the backtest */,
  "backtest_parameters" TEXT /* A JSON object containing the parameters used for the backtest */,
  "backtest_notes" TEXT /* Any notes or comments regarding the backtest */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("backtest_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_backtests_strategy_id FOREIGN KEY ("strategy_id") REFERENCES strategies ("strategy_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "strategies" (
  "strategy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each strategy */,
  "strategy_name" TEXT /* Name of the trading strategy */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the trading strategy */,
  "strategy_type" TEXT /* The type of strategy (e.g., technical, fundamental) */,
  "strategy_risk" TEXT /* The risk level of the strategy (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "strategy_performance" REAL /* The historical performance of the strategy */,
  "strategy_notes" TEXT /* Any notes or comments regarding the strategy */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("strategy_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "strategy_parameters" (
  "param_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each parameter */,
  "strategy_id" INTEGER /* ID of the strategy that uses the parameter */,
  "param_name" TEXT /* Name of the parameter (e.g., moving average period) */,
  "param_value" REAL /* Value of the parameter */,
  "param_type" TEXT /* The type of parameter (e.g., numeric, categorical) */,
  "param_description" TEXT /* A description of the parameter */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("param_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_strategy_parameters_strategy_id FOREIGN KEY ("strategy_id") REFERENCES strategies ("strategy_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_validation" (
  "validation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each validation rule */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data being validated */,
  "validation_rule" TEXT /* Validation rule (e.g., check for missing values) */,
  "validation_result" INTEGER /* Result of the validation (e.g., pass/fail) */,
  "validation_description" TEXT /* A detailed description of the validation rule */,
  "validation_severity" TEXT /* The severity level of the validation rule (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "validation_frequency" TEXT /* The frequency at which the validation rule is applied (e.g., real-time, daily, weekly) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("validation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_validation_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES market_data ("data_id")
)
